name: CapabilityStatement metadata
description: Smoke test for the FHIR capability endpoint. Fetches /metadata and asserts the server returns a CapabilityStatement declaring FHIR R4. Requires no fixtures, so it is a safe first check against any server.

test.name: metadata returns a CapabilityStatement
test.description: GET /metadata must return 200 with a CapabilityStatement resource

assert.description: Response body must be a CapabilityStatement
CapabilityStatement must declare a FHIR version
